name: Shergar:  The Racehorse and the IRA
original_name: Shergar:  The Racehorse and the IRA
overview: Set against the backdrop of IRA activity, this gripping documentary investigates the extraordinary kidnapping of Shergar, a Derby-winning racehorse and global icon.
